title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 513.623 - Disposition of proceeds after sale
text:
513.623.  Disposition of proceeds after sale. — The clear proceeds of any sale or disposition after satisfaction of the interest of any innocent party and after payment of the reasonable costs of the CAFA proceeding, including reasonable storage costs as assessed by the court, if any, shall be distributed pursuant to Section 7 of Article IX of the Constitution of the State of Missouri.
(L. 1986 S.B. 450 § 11, A.L. 1993 S.B. 180)
